challenge.title: Korak 12
challenge.description:
Sada ćete koristiti funkciju str() još jednom. Kao i kod uzrasta, morate konvertovati bilo koju numeričku vrednost u niz karaktera pre spajanja sa drugim tekstom.

Kreirajte parametar nazvan experience_years i postavite vrednost punog broja 5.

Zatim, kreiraj parametar experience_info. Postavi vrednost stringa dobijenog konkateniranjem 'Experience: ', parametra experience_years (koji je konvertovan u string), i ' years'. Ispiši rezultate na terminal.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
first_name = 'John'
last_name = 'Doe'
full_name = first_name + ' ' + last_name
address = '123 Main Street'
address += ', Apartment 4B'
employee_age = 28
employee_info = full_name + ' is ' + str(employee_age) + ' years old'
print(employee_info)

tests.text: Trebalo bi da unesete celobrojnu vrednost 5 u vaš parametar experience_years.
Trebalo bi da postavite vrednost niza znakova dobijenu spajanjem 'Experience: ', str(experience_years), i ' years' u vaš parametar experience_info.

challengeFiles.name: main
challengeFiles.contents:
first_name = 'John'
last_name = 'Doe'
full_name = first_name + ' ' + last_name
address = '123 Main Street'
address += ', Apartment 4B'
employee_age = 28
employee_info = full_name + ' is ' + str(employee_age) + ' years old'
print(employee_info)
experience_years = 5
experience_info = 'Experience: ' + str(experience_years) + ' years'
print(experience_info)
position = 'Data Analyst'
salary = 75000
employee_card = f'Employee: {full_name} | Age: {employee_age} | Position: {position} | Salary: ${salary}'
print(employee_card)
employee_code = 'DEV-2026-JD-001'
department = employee_code[0:3]
print(department)
year_code = employee_code[4:8]
initials = employee_code[9:11]
print(year_code)
print(initials)
last_three = employee_code[-3:]
print(last_three)
